mnemonics: HAS-SC: Homes, Agriculture, Smart-Cities are key IoT use cases.
Every Device In My House Can Observe People Quietly: Represents Environmental Monitoring, Disaster Management, Industrial M&R, Healthcare, Cities, Operations, Precision Agriculture.
keyPoints: IoT enables the connection of physical objects to the internet for data collection and control.
Key application areas include Smart Homes, Industrial Automation, Precision Agriculture, Healthcare, and Smart Cities.
The core value proposition is derived from data-driven insights, automation, and remote monitoring capabilities.
commonMistakes: Assuming IoT is only about consumer gadgets like smart speakers, ignoring its massive industrial (IIoT) and agricultural applications.
Overlooking the critical importance of security and privacy by design in IoT systems, leading to vulnerable networks.
